name_en: 【Top Grade】🎉New Three-in-One🎉1B is here👏 This mini envelope bag features a front flap, with the iconic engraved logo embellishing the front, showcasing the brand's style. The magnetic closure design remains classic, and the woven strap transforms it into a crossbody or shoulder bag, paired with a small coin purse for versatile functionality and use as a clutch😘😘 The soft lambskin lining features a small pocket with a detachable mirror, a thoughtful design. Simple and stylish, ladies hurry up and get one🎉🎉🎉👏
